description: Returns the most common brand and model combinations among currently registered vehicles in Denmark. Use for questions about top models or which specific models dominate the fleet.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 20
